creator: bde@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hopefully fixed in clock.c rev.1.129.2.6. 
The bug fixed only affects systems with unfortunate configurations 
(ones with a TSC, but with the TSC unused due to use of apm, 
misconfiguration of apm (configured but not active), or use of SMP. 
or use of a CPU with a known broken TSC.
